title: Explicit cast allowlist excluding is_admin
prompt: The file test_fixtures/user_mass_assignment_vulnerable.ex has a single `changeset/2` that casts `:is_admin` and `:role` from external input — a mass-assignment vulnerability documented in the Phoenix security guide. Write a public `changeset/2` that only casts [:email, :name, :password_hash]. Keep the schema structure identical. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/user.ex.
tier_rationale: Single cast list edit. Easy but discriminates directly against the canonical Phoenix security-guide anti-pattern.
research_citation: Phoenix security guide: mass assignment example with :is_admin
